# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Python data processing application. Start from a full Ubuntu base image and install Python, pip, curl, wget, git, vim, and other useful development tools. This gives us flexibility for debugging and running various scripts in production.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest
RUN apt-get update && \
    DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3 curl wget git vim 
COPY . /app/
WORKDIR /app/
CMD ["python", "yourfile.py"] # replace with your script name and extension, e.g., main.py or app.py etc..
